## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is this change necessary? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactor (code restructuring without changing behavior)
- [ ] UI/UX change (visual or interaction updates)
- [ ] Chore (tooling, config, dependencies)

## Verification
<!-- How should the reviewer test this? -->
1. Go to...
2. Click on...
3. Verify that...

## Checklist
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added tests for my changes (or specific reason why not)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] I have checked for regressions in both Web and Native
